mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as processing, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) as completionRate, ROUND(AVG(handle_duration), 2) as avgHandleDuration, ROUND(AVG(evaluation_score), 2) as avgEvaluationScore FROM device_work_order WHERE (assignee_id = #{userId} OR creator_id = #{userId})
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

SELECT order_status as status, CASE order_status WHEN 0 THEN 'тЙЁтцёуљє' WHEN 1 THEN 'тцёуљєСИГ' WHEN 2 THEN 'ти▓т«їТѕљ' WHEN 3 THEN 'ти▓т«АТаИ' WHEN 4 THEN 'ти▓тЈќТХѕ' END as statusName, COUNT(*) as count FROM device_work_order WHERE (assignee_id = #{userId} OR creator_id = #{userId})
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY order_status

SELECT priority, CASE priority WHEN 1 THEN 'у┤ДТђЦ' WHEN 2 THEN 'жФў' WHEN 3 THEN 'СИГ' WHEN 4 THEN 'Сйј' END as priorityName, COUNT(*) as count FROM device_work_order WHERE (assignee_id = #{userId} OR creator_id = #{userId})
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
GROUP BY priority ORDER BY priority
